variants: Jackson Elston is an accomplished professional currently living in Diamond Hummock, where he is employed at Verdant Harmony Foods, specializing in sustainable agriculture. Originally from Meadowforge Hollow, he attended the Lionmane Institute, gaining the knowledge necessary to impact eco-friendly practices within the industry. His dedication and contributions to sustainable food production have been recognized with the Seafrost Emblem, a testament to his commitment to the environment and his profession.
